title: DEKTON Pro Light XN80 Night Time Mood Light - Cob Cabinet Light 4aaa Batteries (Carbon Batteries Included)| Adjustable Lighting Modes| Beam Distance: 5m 80 Lumens Output| More Than 20hrs Working Time
features: Versatile Lighting Solution: The Dekton Pro Light Xn80 is designed to provide flexible lighting for any setting. Ideal for mood lighting, cabinet illumination, or night-time visibility, this compact COB cabinet light enhances your space with a bright 80 lumens output, perfect for creating a cozy ambiance or illuminating dark areas.

Adjustable Lighting Modes: Tailor your lighting experience with adjustable modes that allow you to select the perfect brightness level for your needs. Whether you need a soft glow for relaxation or a brighter light for tasks, the Xn80 offers customizable settings to suit various activities and preferences.

Extended Beam Distance: Equipped with advanced COB (Chip-on-Board) technology, this night-time mood light provides an impressive beam distance of up to 5 meters. This feature ensures you have ample illumination for a wide area, making it an excellent choice for larger spaces or areas requiring extended light coverage.

Long-lasting Performance: Enjoy more than 20 hours of continuous use on a single set of batteries. The Dekton Pro Light Xn80 is powered by 4 AAA carbon batteries (included), ensuring long-lasting performance and reducing the need for frequent battery changes, providing convenience and reliability.

Compact and Durable Design: Built with durability in mind, the Xn80 features a robust construction that can withstand daily use. Its compact design allows for easy placement in various locations, whether mounted on a wall, placed in a cabinet, or used as a portable light source.
description: Illuminate your space with the Dekton Pro Light XN80 Night Time Mood Light, a versatile and efficient lighting solution designed for any setting. Ideal for use as a COB cabinet light, this compact yet powerful unit operates on 4 AAA carbon batteries, which are included for your convenience. The XN80 offers adjustable lighting modes, allowing you to customize the brightness and ambiance to suit your needs. With an impressive beam distance of up to 5 meters and an output of 80 lumens, this light provides ample illumination for both practical tasks and creating a cozy atmosphere. The Dekton Pro Light XN80 is engineered for longevity, boasting more than 20 hours of continuous working time on a single set of batteries. Its durable design ensures reliable performance and is perfect for use in various environments, from under-cabinet lighting in your kitchen to creating a soft glow in your living room or bedroom. The light's compact size and versatile mounting options make it easy to install in tight spaces or on the go, providing a practical solution for your lighting needs wherever you are. With its sleek design and efficient functionality, the Dekton Pro Light XN80 is not only a practical lighting tool but also an elegant addition to your home decor. Whether you're looking to brighten up a workspace, add ambiance to a room, or have a reliable light source for emergencies, the Dekton Pro Light XN80 delivers exceptional performance and convenience.
